records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 7.1 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent sparse m16n8k32 signed INT8 inline PTX with selector immediates 0 and 1
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 189,884-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 c09e93484e59f6e1b76a62db146f66164234f6f2fb73842cbad12a14d6cac76c and 54,308-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 d8b822ccfe9e6918437f8fdc6b2bcfe5c1326100cfb135306d1d4df4dd5b01e6.

stages.representation: isolated base sparse m16n8k32 INT8 MMA floor kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 21,480-byte cubin with SHA-256 ba48413405086ccf4aa28fba90fb7e40c0dc6df25af437a981ef80e89a44d3bd; cuobjdump contained all eight raw sparse variants plus both representative compatibility-path calls as IMMA.SP.16832 instructions.
